use_cases: Hero section landing pages for SaaS and tech product sites
Creative portfolio or agency websites seeking dynamic visual impact
Interactive marketing pages where mouse-driven visual feedback enhances engagement
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based hero component featuring an anti-gravity particle system that repels from mouse movement with physics-based spring animations. The main particle field responds dynamically to cursor proximity while background particles add ambient motion. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps rendering with configurable density, repulsion radius, and return speed for creating immersive, responsive hero sections.
